narrative:
Bath Twp township has 7,921 registered voters, with 53.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.3%, a clear Republican lean of 8.2 percentage points.
